testcase.name: test_blocked[ALTER TABLE dataworks.ord DROP COLUMN name]
test_blocked[ALTER TABLE dataworks.ord DROP COLUMNS (a, b)]
test_allowed[INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dataworks.dwd_x PARTITION(dt) SELECT * FROM src]
test_allowed[CREATE TABLE dataworks.dwd_x (id bigint) PARTITIONED BY (dt string)]
test_allowed[CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dataworks.t (id bigint)]
test_allowed[ALTER TABLE dataworks.t ADD COLUMNS (age bigint)]
test_allowed[SELECT * FROM dataworks.t WHERE dt='20260101' LIMIT 10]
